title: GMS Week 6 - RAMPING UP!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 14/02/2022
Image reference: 2022-02-14_gms-week-5-ramping-up_img1.jpg
Following recent upward moves on domestic steel plate prices at nearly every major recycling destination, it was another week of firm pricing and a sub-continent market that is still on an aggressive footing for the most part. Demand remains rampant and capacity at yards remains open for any available tonnage (market or otherwise), leading to bidding wars on any of the marginal number of choice units hitting the recycling markets. L/Cs are of continuing concern across the sub-continent destinations, and it is becoming increasingly important / urgent for industry players to have additional bank checks and margins must be placed with the opening banks to ensure L/Cs are opened and released in a timely manner.
